title: WebhookInput
description: Input fields for creating or updating a webhook.

event.description: The event to subscribe to. Available events include site.changed, post.added, post.deleted, post.edited, post.published, post.published.edited, post.unpublished, post.scheduled, post.unscheduled, post.rescheduled, page.added, page.deleted, page.edited, page.published, page.published.edited, page.unpublished, page.scheduled, page.unscheduled, page.rescheduled, tag.added, tag.edited, tag.deleted, post.tag.attached, post.tag.detached, page.tag.attached, page.tag.detached, member.added, member.edited, member.deleted.

target_url.description: URL to receive webhook POST requests
